title: Interview Question Randomizer for Amber
description: A personalized behavioral interview prep tool I built as a gift for Amber, who's transitioning into Product Management. Each click randomizes a thoughtful question plus a tip on how to answer it — tailored to the realities of pivoting into PM from a non-traditional path.

title: Mama's Cozy Kitchen
description: A cozy, kid-friendly cooking game inspired by Cooking Mama. Little chefs cook alongside Mama through three recipes — veggie soup, hot cocoa, and pancakes — with interactive steps like chopping vegetables along dotted lines, playful cartoon graphics, and cheerful encouragement when each dish is done.

title: Expense Splitter
description: A clean bill-splitting tool for group dinners and shared expenses. Add your people, enter each line item, and assign who had what — it splits tip and tax proportionally and copies a tidy per-person breakdown you can paste straight into the group chat.

title: StoryTeller
description: Speak a story out loud and get a beautiful, printable children's book. Narrate your tale with your voice and StoryTeller turns it into a formatted book you can print and read together at bedtime.
